name: UwsUwsProvSubjAreaBalSumLoad

sqlReaderQuery.value: SELECT TBL_BAL_SUM.TRGT_SYS_CD, TBL_BAL_SUM.SUBJ_AREA_NM, TBL_BAL_SUM.BAL_DT, TBL_BAL_SUM.CLMN_SUM_TLRNC_CD, TBL_BAL_SUM.ROW_TO_ROW_TLRNC_CD, TBL_BAL_SUM.RI_TLRNC_CD FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_UWSOwner}.TBL_BAL_SUM TBL_BAL_SUM WHERE TBL_BAL_SUM.TRGT_SYS_CD = '@{pipeline().parameters.Target}' AND TBL_BAL_SUM.SUBJ_AREA_NM = '@{pipeline().parameters.Subject}' ORDER BY TBL_BAL_SUM.BAL_DT ASC

SELECT TBL_BAL_SUM.TRGT_SYS_CD, TBL_BAL_SUM.SUBJ_AREA_NM, COUNT(*) AS ROW_COUNT FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_UWSOwner}.TBL_BAL_SUM TBL_BAL_SUM WHERE TBL_BAL_SUM.TRGT_SYS_CD = '@{pipeline().parameters.Target}' AND TBL_BAL_SUM.SUBJ_AREA_NM = '@{pipeline().parameters.Subject}' GROUP BY TBL_BAL_SUM.TRGT_SYS_CD, TBL_BAL_SUM.SUBJ_AREA_NM

text.value: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_edw_staging}.TBLBALSUMFINAL_TMP_UwsUwsProvSubjAreaBalSumLoad; CREATE TABLE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_edw_staging}.TBLBALSUMFINAL_TMP_UwsUwsProvSubjAreaBalSumLoad (TRGT_SYS_CD VARCHAR(50), SUBJ_AREA_NM VARCHAR(50), LAST_BAL_DT DATETIME, TLRNC_CD VARCHAR(10), PREV_ISSUE_CRCTD_IN CHAR(1), TRGT_RUN_CYC_NO INT, CRT_DTM DATETIME, LAST_UPDT_DTM DATETIME, USER_ID VARCHAR(50)); DECLARE @bal_dt DATETIME, @col1 VARCHAR(10), @col2 VARCHAR(10), @col3 VARCHAR(10), @total_count INT, @svPrevCount INT=0, @svCurrCount INT=0, @svTempTlrncCd VARCHAR(10)='', @svTempRslvIn VARCHAR(1)='Y', @svTempRslvIncd VARCHAR(10)='', @svCSCurrTlrncCd VARCHAR(10)='', @svRRCurrTlrncCd VARCHAR(10)='', @svRICurrTlrncCd VARCHAR(10)='', @currdt VARCHAR(10)='@{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate}'; DECLARE c CURSOR FOR SELECT A.BAL_DT, A.CLMN_SUM_TLRNC_CD, A.ROW_TO_ROW_TLRNC_CD, A.RI_TLRNC_CD, B.ROW_COUNT FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_edw_staging}.TBLBALSUM1_TMP_UwsUwsProvSubjAreaBalSumLoad A CROSS JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_edw_staging}.TBLBALSUM2_TMP_UwsUwsProvSubjAreaBalSumLoad B ORDER BY A.BAL_DT; OPEN c; FETCH NEXT FROM c INTO @bal_dt, @col1, @col2, @col3, @total_count; WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS=0 BEGIN SET @svCSCurrTlrncCd=@col1; SET @svRRCurrTlrncCd=@col2; SET @svRICurrTlrncCd=@col3; SET @svCurrCount=@svPrevCount+1; IF CONVERT(VARCHAR(10),@bal_dt,120)<>@currdt BEGIN SET @svTempTlrncCd='NEXT ROW'; SET @svTempRslvIncd='NEXT ROW'; END ELSE BEGIN IF ((@svCSCurrTlrncCd IN ('BAL','NA')) AND (@svRRCurrTlrncCd IN ('BAL','NA')) AND (@svRICurrTlrncCd IN ('BAL','NA')) AND @svTempTlrncCd NOT IN ('OUT','IN')) BEGIN SET @svTempTlrncCd='BAL'; END ELSE IF ((@svCSCurrTlrncCd IN ('BAL','IN') OR @svRRCurrTlrncCd IN ('BAL','IN') OR @svRICurrTlrncCd IN ('BAL','IN')) AND @svTempTlrncCd<>'OUT') BEGIN SET @svTempTlrncCd='IN'; END ELSE BEGIN SET @svTempTlrncCd='OUT'; END IF CONVERT(VARCHAR(10),@bal_dt,120)=@currdt BEGIN SET @svTempRslvIncd='NEXT ROW'; END ELSE BEGIN IF ((@svCSCurrTlrncCd IN ('BAL','NA') AND @svRRCurrTlrncCd IN ('BAL','NA') AND @svRICurrTlrncCd IN ('BAL','NA') AND @svTempRslvIncd NOT IN ('OUT','IN')) OR @svTempRslvIncd='BAL') BEGIN SET @svTempRslvIncd='BAL'; END ELSE IF ((@svCSCurrTlrncCd IN ('BAL','IN') OR @svRRCurrTlrncCd IN ('BAL','IN') OR @svRICurrTlrncCd IN ('BAL','IN')) AND @svTempRslvIncd<>'OUT') BEGIN SET @svTempRslvIncd='IN'; END ELSE BEGIN SET @svTempRslvIncd='OUT'; END END IF CONVERT(VARCHAR(10),@bal_dt,120)<>@currdt BEGIN IF ((@svCSCurrTlrncCd IN ('BAL','IN') OR @svRRCurrTlrncCd IN ('BAL','IN') OR @svRICurrTlrncCd IN ('BAL','IN')) AND @svTempRslvIn<>'N') BEGIN SET @svTempRslvIn='Y'; END ELSE BEGIN SET @svTempRslvIn='N'; END END END SET @svPrevCount=@svCurrCount; FETCH NEXT FROM c INTO @bal_dt, @col1, @col2, @col3, @total_count; END CLOSE c; DEALLOCATE c; IF @svPrevCount=@total_count BEGIN INSERT INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_edw_staging}.TBLBALSUMFINAL_TMP_UwsUwsProvSubjAreaBalSumLoad (TRGT_SYS_CD, SUBJ_AREA_NM, LAST_BAL_DT, TLRNC_CD, PREV_ISSUE_CRCTD_IN, TRGT_RUN_CYC_NO, CRT_DTM, LAST_UPDT_DTM, USER_ID) SELECT '@{pipeline().parameters.Target}', '@{pipeline().parameters.Subject}', CAST(@currdt AS DATETIME), @svTempTlrncCd, @svTempRslvIn, @{pipeline().parameters.ExtrRunCycle}, CAST(@currdt AS DATETIME), CAST(@currdt AS DATETIME), '@{pipeline().parameters.UWSAcct}'; END

PROCESSING:
                  
                The Job loads the SUBJECT_AREA_BAL_SUM table after the balancing control job is done for a given Subject Area

Annotations:
Job Name: UwsMbrSubjAreaBalSumLoad
Extraction From Table Balance Summary table for a given subject area and target system and loading into the Subject Area Balance Summary table
Read all the Data from UWS TBL_BAL_SUM TBL_BAL_SUM Table; Pull records based on SOURCE AND  SUBJECT
Reference Code Mapping Data for Code SK lookups
Left Join to pull the MemberCounts 
Join Keys:
SOURCE AND SUBJECT
Defaults and Null Handling
Update then Insert the SUBJ_AREA_BAL_SUM Data.
